description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel, commonly used for shipping and delivery in urban environments. The box is made of brown corrugated cardboard and features a wide strip of sealing tape running along the top. On two opposing sides, there are black printed handling symbols, including icons for 'fragile', 'this side up', 'handle with care', and 'keep dry', indicating the need for careful handling. The other two sides display the word 'FRAGILE' in bold, black stencil-style lettering, further emphasizing the delicate nature of the contents. The surface of the box is matte and slightly textured, typical of standard shipping cartons. The object appears to be empty or lightly filled, as there are no visible bulges or deformations.
description: A brown cardboard shipping box with 'FRAGILE' stenciled on two sides and handling symbols on the others, sealed with a strip of tape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown box with a wide tape strip and three black handling symbols.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the word 'FRAGILE' in bold, black stencil letters across the brown cardboard.
description_view_2: Rear view identical to the front, with the tape strip and handling symbols visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'FRAGILE' stencil, matching the other side.
